description_long: This is an ornate wrought iron gate flanked by two robust stone pillars, each topped with a decorative black sphere. The gate features intricate scrollwork and a central crest at the top, giving it a grand and classical appearance. On each pillar, there is a mounted lantern-style light fixture, adding both functionality and elegance. The lower portion of the structure is composed of solid stone, while the upper sections and the gate itself are made of black metal bars and filigree. The gate is connected to short sections of matching metal fencing on either side, which are anchored into the stone base. The overall design suggests a secure yet visually impressive entrance, suitable for upscale urban residences or parks.
description: An ornate wrought iron gate with intricate scrollwork, flanked by stone pillars topped with black spheres and lanterns, connected to short metal fences.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full decorative gate, both stone pillars with lanterns, and the attached metal fencing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the stone pillars and the protruding lanterns, with the gate and fencing seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the ornate gate, pillars, and fencing from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thickness of the pillars and the lanterns' placement.
